## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for this change
- [ ] `fmt` / `lint` / `test` all pass locally
- [ ] Docs updated (README, CHANGELOG, or docs/) if user-facing behavior changed
